---
title: "Tunnel to Pinehurst Loop"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Rockridge" data-miles="22.63" data-elevation="3394.36">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Rockridge</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>22.63</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3394.36 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#91cf60;">71%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>10.64</td>
      <td>47.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.04</td>
      <td>18.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>2.61</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.40</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.40</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.54</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,871</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
      <td>99 ± 49</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>502</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>17 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>212</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>818</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>26 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>420</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>14 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>718</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>28 ± 11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>111</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>54</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,871</td>
      <td>22.5</td>
      <td>167 ± 69</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>502</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>17 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>212</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>818</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>26 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>28</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>420</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>14 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>718</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>28 ± 11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>111</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>54</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>30.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>5.5</td>
      <td>24.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>22.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>3.6</td>
      <td>15.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
